patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (Patient ID 104) with documented mixed dyslipidemia and essential hypertension. Recent notable labs from 07/03/2023 include triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), VLDL 32 mg/dL (H), LDL 62 mg/dL, HDL 54 mg/dL, ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), and eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L). Historical labs include elevated glucose 199 mg/dL (01/11/2021). Diagnoses include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, postoperative/unspecified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. A colonoscopy with biopsy was scheduled/performed 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Functional assessments and smoking history are discordant across records. Multiple care team members documented, including Hand Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and Hershey Curtis L, MD (PCP).
